actions.failure: You fail to prepare the spell, but the spell slot remains available for you to prepare a different spell. You can't try to borrow this spell again until the next time you prepare spells.
actions.name: Borrow an Arcane Spell
actions.success: You prepare the borrowed spell as part of your normal spell preparation.
actions.text: If you're an arcane spellcaster who prepares spells, you can attempt to prepare a spell from someone else's arcane spellbook, arcane witch familiar, or the like. The GM sets the DC for the check based on the spell's rank and rarity; it's typically a bit easier than Learning the Spell.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Exploration
traits.text: An activity with this trait takes more than a turn to use, and can usually be used only during exploration mode.

skill.name: Arcana
skill.text:
Arcana measures how much you know about arcane magic and creatures.
* ***Recall Knowledge*** about arcane theories; magic traditions; creatures of arcane significance (like constructs, beasts, and elementals); and the Astral Plane, Elemental Planes, and the Netherworld.
